design_philosophy: High-end product studio aesthetic avoiding all standard template structures. Inspired by Stripe (layout creativity), Linear (precision), and Apple (flow). Emphasizes minimalism, bold typography, functional asymmetry, and a refined corporate feel.

typography.rules: Headings must have extremely tight tracking (tracking-tighter). Avoid default bold; use varying weights (light, medium, black) for tension. No standard centering; prioritize optical alignment.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Overlapping elements and bento-style grids.
spacing_and_layout.scale: Use 2-3x normal padding. Containers should use p-8, p-12, or p-16.
spacing_and_layout.grid_mode: TETRIS GRID (Mode A) for the feature sections to create tension and asymmetry.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle translate-y (-translate-y-1), slight shadow increase, and sophisticated hover text colors.
motion_and_interactions.scroll: Smooth scroll reveals using Framer Motion (opacity 0 -> 1, y: 20 -> 0) triggered via intersection observers.

sections.name: Navigation
sections.layout: Sticky, glassmorphic (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70) with 1px border-b border-border. z-50.

sections.name: Hero (Split-screen)
sections.layout: grid md:grid-cols-12 gap-8 items-center min-h-[85vh] pt-24
sections.left_col: col-span-12 md:col-span-5. Massive H1. Left-aligned text. Two CTAs (Primary accent, Secondary outline).
sections.right_col: col-span-12 md:col-span-7 relative. Dynamic UI mock floating. Layered images with framer-motion floating animation (y: [-10, 10]).
sections.image_requirements: Use the hero dashboard UI mockup image, add drop-shadow-2xl and rounded-2xl.

sections.name: What We Do (Horizontal Scroll)
sections.content: Interactive cards for Websites, Apps, Product Builds. On hover: ring-2 ring-primary/20 and slight lift.

sections.name: Feature Strip (Zig-Zag)
sections.layout: Alternating grid layout. Row 1: Text Left, Image Right. Row 2: Image Left, Text Right.
sections.content: Fast builds, Clear pricing, Real deployments. Use 1px borders and large padding.
sections.image_requirements: Use abstract tech backgrounds or app mockups for the image side.

sections.name: Services (Interactive Panels)
sections.content: Large tall panels. Website Build $750, Starter App $2,500, Full Build & Scale Custom. High contrast hover states.
sections.style: Neumorphic/Tactile variant: 1px subtle border, flat background, strong shadow on hover.

sections.name: Process Timeline
sections.layout: Vertical timeline with a connecting line.
sections.content: Idea -> Build -> Launch. Use staggered reveal animations. Sticky left label, scrolling right content.

sections.name: What We Build
sections.content: Showcase mobile apps, dashboards, websites. Images filling the containers with object-cover.
sections.image_requirements: Use the mobile app mockups and dashboard mockups.

sections.name: Built for Operators
sections.layout: Split section. Left: Operator image. Right: Sharp, authoritative text.
sections.content: Speaks to business owners. Tone is precise and no-nonsense.
sections.image_requirements: Use the focused business founder image.

sections.name: Final CTA / Contact
sections.layout: Centered massive text block with a sleek Shadcn-based form.
sections.action: Email notification via Resend. Ensure validation is present.

components_instructions.logo: Create a CSS-based logo since AI generation failed. Text 'MJV' in Cabinet Grotesk, font-black, tracking-tighter, text-primary. Add a subtle 1px border box around it or a small accent dot in #0D9488.
components_instructions.buttons: Primary CTA must use #0D9488 (Teal 600) for background to respect user request but maintain E1 standard. Text white. Hover state must be #0F766E. Secondary CTA should be outline or ghost with text-primary border-border.
components_instructions.forms: Use Shadcn Form, Input, and Textarea. Customize to have 1px border-slate-200, focus:ring-primary, subtle radius (rounded-md).
components_instructions.icons: Use lucide-react. Stroke width 1.5 for a premium precise feel.

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='contact-submit-button', data-testid='hero-cta').

media.description: Mobile app interface for 'What We Build' section
Abstract white/gray tech background for feature zig-zag
